top_signals.title: Traders Cut South Africa Rate-Hike Bets on Iran Peace Deal
top_signals.summary: Traders have scaled back bets on additional South African interest-rate hikes after a US-Iran peace deal sent oil prices tumbling, potentially reducing inflationary pressures.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Central-bank repricing affecting yields, FX, liquidity and equities.

top_signals.title: Trump veers toward exit in Iran war but risks loom - Reuters
top_signals.summary: Trump veers toward exit in Iran war but risks loom  Reuters
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: Iran Was a Major Test That Markets Have Passed, Says UBS’s Baweja
top_signals.summary: Bhanu Baweja, chief strategist at UBS, sees Europe as the near-term trade for investors as he expects that consumer cyclicals “will rip” with the announcement of an agreement between the US and Iran. (Source: Bloomberg)
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: Bitcoin mining difficulty drops 10% in second-largest negative adjustment of 2026
top_signals.summary: The cut hands surviving miners roughly 11% more bitcoin per unit of active hashrate, but all-in production economics remain underwater at current prices.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Digital asset volatility and institutional crypto positioning changes.

top_signals.title: FBI disrupts massive AI-powered phishing service using a million URLs
top_signals.summary: In a coordinated effort, the FBI, working with Google and Black Lotus Labs, has dismantled a massive Chinese phishing-as-a-service operation called Outsider Enterprise with thousands of phishing websites used to steal credit card data and passwords. [...]
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.
